note: Appending a cell to a row is unusual — normally cells are seeded at row-Add time. This op exists for completeness; pptx tables are strictly rectangular, so a standalone Add cell only succeeds when the row currently has fewer cells than the table grid (an OOXML-illegal state).

text.description: single-run text content. pptx-only override: prefer set tc[C] for cell text in pptx; standalone Add cell rarely has room to land within a rectangular table grid. Set + Get unchanged.
text.readback: string concatenated from all <a:r>/<a:t> in the cell paragraphs

colspan.description: horizontal cell span (a:tc @gridSpan). Surfaces only when the cell spans more than one column. Read-only — set spans by structuring the table at Add time.

rowspan.description: vertical cell span (a:tc @rowSpan). Surfaces only when the cell spans more than one row. Read-only — set spans by structuring the table at Add time.

padding.left.description: left cell padding (a:tcPr @marL). Read-only readback; emitted as a unit-qualified length (cm/in/pt).

padding.right.description: right cell padding (a:tcPr @marR). Read-only readback; emitted as a unit-qualified length.

padding.top.description: top cell padding (a:tcPr @marT). Read-only readback; emitted as a unit-qualified length.

padding.bottom.description: bottom cell padding (a:tcPr @marB). Read-only readback; emitted as a unit-qualified length.

padding.description: shorthand to set all four cell paddings at once (a:tcPr @marL/@marR/@marT/@marB). Accepts a unit-qualified length applied to every edge.

wrap.description: cell text wrap (a:txBody/a:bodyPr @wrap). true=square (wrap), false=none (clip to cell). Set on the cell's body properties.

textdirection.description: cell text rotation (a:tcPr @vert). horizontal|vertical90|vertical270|stacked. Round-trips through the same canonical vocabulary.

direction.description: first-paragraph reading direction (a:pPr @rtl). ltr|rtl. Fans out to every paragraph in the cell's text body; readback reflects the first paragraph only.

merge.right.description: convenience for horizontal merge — stamps gridSpan=N on this cell and hMerge=true on the next N-1 cells in the same row.

merge.down.description: convenience for vertical merge — stamps rowSpan=N on this cell and vMerge=true on the same column in the next N-1 rows.

bevel.description: 3-D cell bevel (a:tcPr/a:cell3D). 'none' to clear, or a preset name (circle, slope, cross, angle, softRound, convex, coolSlant, divot, riblet, hardEdge, artDeco, …). Optional 'NAME;Wpt;Hpt' to set width/height.

opacity.description: fill alpha as a 0–1 fraction or 0–100 percent (post-applied to the cell's solid/gradient fill).

image.description: embed an image file as the cell's blip fill (a:tcPr/a:blipFill). Path to a local image; relationship is added to the slide. Replaces any prior fill.

linespacing.description: line spacing applied to every paragraph in the cell. Accepts multiplier ('1.5x', '150%') or fixed points ('18pt').

spacebefore.description: space before every paragraph in the cell. Unit-qualified length ('12pt', '0.5cm').

spaceafter.description: space after every paragraph in the cell. Unit-qualified length ('12pt', '0.5cm').

align.description: first-paragraph horizontal alignment applied to every paragraph in the cell (a:pPr @algn). left|center|right|justify. Readback reflects the first paragraph only.

font.description: Latin (and East Asian fallback) font typeface for every run in the cell. Fans out to a:rPr/a:latin + a:ea on every existing run.

size.description: font size for every run in the cell (a:rPr @sz). Unit-qualified ('14pt') or bare number (points).

bold.description: bold for every run in the cell (a:rPr @b).

italic.description: italic for every run in the cell (a:rPr @i).

underline.description: underline style for every run in the cell (a:rPr @u). single|double|none or any OOXML underline value.

strike.description: strikethrough for every run in the cell (a:rPr @strike). single|double|none.

color.description: font color for every run in the cell (a:rPr/a:solidFill).

fill.description: cell background fill. Accepts a solid color (hex, named, rgb(...)), scheme color name (accent1–accent6, dk1, dk2, lt1, lt2, hyperlink), 'none' for explicit no-fill, or a gradient string 'COLOR1-COLOR2[-ANGLE]' (e.g. 'FF0000-0000FF-90'). Stored as a:solidFill/a:noFill/a:gradFill on a:tcPr.
fill.readback: #RRGGBB uppercase, 'gradient' (with separate 'gradient' key), or 'image' for picture fill

baseline.description: first run baseline offset for the cell text (percent units; positive=raised).

gridSpan.description: horizontal merge span — number of grid columns this cell spans (>=2 means merged across). Setting gridSpan=N also stamps hMerge=true on the next (N-1) cells in the same row, matching the convenience prop merge.right.

hmerge.description: true on cells continued from a horizontal merge anchor (CT_TableCell @hMerge).

vmerge.description: true on cells continued from a vertical merge anchor (CT_TableCell @vMerge). Surfaced by Query for table cells.

image.relId.description: relationship id of an embedded image used as the cell's blip fill.

border.all.description: all four cell edges. Format: 'WIDTH[ DASH][ COLOR]' (e.g. '1pt solid FF0000') or 'STYLE;WIDTH;COLOR[;DASH]' (style ignored — kept for docx parity). DASH ∈ solid|dot|dash|lgDash|dashDot|sysDot|sysDash. Use 'none' to clear. Alias: border. Stored as a:lnL/lnR/lnT/lnB on a:tcPr. Cross-format note: docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' — pptx is more lenient.

border.bottom.description: bottom border. Format: STYLE[;SIZE[;COLOR[;SPACE]]]. Cross-format note: pptx accepts a space-separated 'WIDTH DASH COLOR' form; docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' (SIZE is in 1/8 pt units).

border.left.description: left border. Format: STYLE[;SIZE[;COLOR[;SPACE]]]. Cross-format note: pptx accepts a space-separated 'WIDTH DASH COLOR' form; docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' (SIZE is in 1/8 pt units).

border.right.description: right border. Format: STYLE[;SIZE[;COLOR[;SPACE]]]. Cross-format note: pptx accepts a space-separated 'WIDTH DASH COLOR' form; docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' (SIZE is in 1/8 pt units).

border.tl2br.description: diagonal from top-left to bottom-right (a:lnTlToBr). Format same as border.all. Cross-format note: docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' — pptx is more lenient. Add/Set only — Get does not surface diagonal borders today.
border.tl2br.readback: n/a (Get does not surface diagonal borders)

border.top.description: top border. Format: STYLE[;SIZE[;COLOR[;SPACE]]]. Cross-format note: pptx accepts a space-separated 'WIDTH DASH COLOR' form; docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' (SIZE is in 1/8 pt units).

border.tr2bl.description: diagonal from top-right to bottom-left (a:lnBlToTr). Format same as border.all. Cross-format note: docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' — pptx is more lenient. Add/Set only — Get does not surface diagonal borders today.
border.tr2bl.readback: n/a (Get does not surface diagonal borders)
